uplink.description: Status report, probe 1 leak, probe 2 dry (any-probe leak true)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame derived from the TTN status example (probe 1 leak, probe 2 dry). expected.data authored here; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.0, WaterLeak_1=Leak, WaterLeak_2=NoLeak).

uplink.description: Status report, both probes dry (any-probe leak false)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame, both probes dry, battery 2.8 V. expected.data authored here; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 2.8, both WaterLeak NoLeak).

uplink.description: Status report, both probes leak, low-battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame, both probes leak, byte[3]=156 (0x80|28) sets the low-battery flag, masked voltage 2.8 V. expected.data authored here; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt '2.8(low battery)', both WaterLeak Leak).
TTN startup version report (reportType 0x00): carries SW/HW version + datecode, not a measurement, so we error.
TTN ConfigReportRsp on fPort 7: configuration traffic, not a measurement uplink, so we error.
